message:
🐛 Fix 10 test failures in useVersionCheck.test.tsx (#10334)

The safeJsonParse() guard (PR #10323) checks Content-Type before
calling response.json(). Mock fetch responses in the test used
`headers: { get: () => null }` which returns null for Content-Type,
causing safeJsonParse to throw before parsing.

Add a jsonHeaders() helper that returns 'application/json' for
Content-Type queries and apply it to all mock responses where JSON
parsing is expected.

Fixes #10329

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
